description: ProAssurance Corporation, through its subsidiaries, provides property and casualty insurance, and reinsurance products in the United States. It operates through three segments: Specialty Property and Casualty, Workers' Compensation Insurance, Segregated Portfolio Cell Reinsurance, and Corporate. The company offers professional liability insurance to healthcare providers and institutions, and attorneys and their firms; medical technology liability insurance to medical technology and life sciences companies; and custom alternative risk solutions, including assumed reinsurance and captive cell pr
